ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the university is located */,
  "is_cc_member" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the university is a member of the Council on Forensics (CC) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was founded */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "debate_club_name" TEXT /* Name of the university's debate club */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the university */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the debate club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "standing" INTEGER /* Ranking position of the university */,
  "ndt_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the university in the NDT */,
  "ndt_varsity" INTEGER /* Varsity points earned by the university in the NDT */,
  "ndt_district" INTEGER /* District number of the university in the NDT */,
  "tournament_year" TEXT /* Year of the tournament */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the standing */,
  "total_debaters" INTEGER /* Total number of debaters from the university */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the university's debaters */,
  "best_debater" TEXT /* Name of the best debater from the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_ndt_district FOREIGN KEY ("ndt_district") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach, researcher) */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Number of the district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "total_universities" INTEGER /* Total number of universities in the district */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the district information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_standings" (
  "hist_standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical standing entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the historical standing */,
  "standing" INTEGER /* Ranking position of the university in the NDT */,
  "ndt_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the university in the NDT */,
  "ndt_varsity" INTEGER /* Varsity points earned by the university in the NDT */,
  "ndt_district" INTEGER /* District number of the university in the NDT */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., NDT, other) */,
  "total_debaters" INTEGER /* Total number of debaters from the university */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the university's debaters */,
  "best_debater" TEXT /* Name of the best debater from the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hist_standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_standings_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_standings_ndt_district FOREIGN KEY ("ndt_district") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., bug, suggestion, praise) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
